api/client/javascript.purpose: Published npm package (@openmeter/sdk) for the OpenMeter JavaScript SDK. Orchestrates code generation (openapi-typescript + orval), dual ESM/CJS build (duel), and exports four sub-packages: default (admin client), /portal, /react, /zod. All source files under src/ are either generated or hand-authored wrappers; the dist/ is the published artifact.

patterns.name: Generated-first src/client/schemas.ts
patterns.description: schemas.ts is regenerated by scripts/generate.ts using openapi-typescript on api/openapi.cloud.yaml. Never hand-edit it; changes are lost on next `pnpm run generate:client`.
patterns.example: pnpm run generate:client  # runs tsx scripts/generate.ts && biome format

patterns.name: Orval for Zod schemas
patterns.description: src/zod/index.ts is produced by orval using orval.config.ts (input: ../../openapi.cloud.yaml, output: zod client, PascalCase naming). Never edit this file; run `pnpm run generate:zod`.

patterns.name: Four named sub-package exports
patterns.description: package.json exports map '.', './portal', './react', './zod' to separate dist entry points. New resource classes go in src/client/ and must be registered as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts.

patterns.name: Dual ESM/CJS build via duel
patterns.description: Build script is `duel`, producing both dist/*.js (ESM) and dist/cjs/*.cjs (CJS). tsconfig.json compilerOptions use module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=nodenext.

patterns.name: openapi-typescript patch applied at install time
patterns.description: pnpm.patchedDependencies in package.json applies patches/openapi-typescript.patch to the dist/ of the installed openapi-typescript package. After upgrading openapi-typescript, regenerate or update the patch file.

patterns.name: Biome for linting and formatting
patterns.description: biome.json configures Biome as the sole linter/formatter (no eslint/prettier except prettier used by orval). Style rules include useConst, useAsConstAssertion, noUselessElse. Run `pnpm run format` or `biome lint --write`.

key_file_guides.role: Drives orval code generation for src/zod/index.ts. Input is ../../openapi.cloud.yaml. PascalCase naming. Coercion enabled for body/param/query.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Changing the input path breaks generation if the relative URL from scripts/ does not resolve; orval must be run from the package root.

key_file_guides.role: Defines the four sub-package exports, pnpm patch for openapi-typescript, generate/build/test scripts, and peer dependency on react >=18.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a new export path requires updating both 'exports' and ensuring the duel build emits the matching file; missing either breaks consumers.

key_file_guides.role: Strict TypeScript config. Excludes test files and scripts/ from compilation. Includes react/*.tsx for JSX.
key_file_guides.watch_for: scripts/**/*.ts and *.config.ts are excluded — type errors in build scripts are silent unless run separately with tsc.

key_file_guides.role: Single consolidated patch applied to openapi-typescript dist/ via pnpm patchedDependencies. Contains all local bug fixes not yet upstream.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Stale patch base hash after upgrading openapi-typescript causes pnpm install to fail. Must regenerate patch after each upgrade.

key_file_guides.role: Root package entry — re-exports everything from src/client/index.js. Do not add logic here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only re-exports the default (admin) client. Portal, react, and zod are separate sub-package exports, not re-exported from the root.

anti_patterns: Hand-editing src/client/schemas.ts or src/zod/index.ts — both are generated and overwritten by `pnpm run generate`
Adding admin-level endpoints to src/portal/ — the portal client is intentionally restricted to portal-token-scoped operations
Adding new resource classes to src/client/ without registering them as public fields on the root OpenMeter class in src/client/index.ts
Running scripts/generate.ts from a directory other than the package root — the relative URL to openapi.cloud.yaml will fail to resolve
Creating multiple patch files instead of the single consolidated patches/openapi-typescript.patch — pnpm patchedDependencies expects one file

decisions.decision: openapi-typescript is patched at the dist/ level rather than forked
decisions.rationale: Allows tracking upstream releases while carrying local fixes; the patch is reapplied automatically by pnpm at install time and must be regenerated after each upstream upgrade.

decisions.decision: Four distinct sub-package exports instead of a single entry
decisions.rationale: Admin client, portal client, React integration, and Zod schemas have different runtime dependencies and bundle sizes; splitting them lets consumers tree-shake and avoid pulling in react or zod unless needed.

decisions.decision: Type overrides (date-time → Date) applied via openapiTS transform hook in scripts/generate.ts, not post-hoc regex
decisions.rationale: The transform hook runs during AST traversal so the override is type-safe and stable across openapi-typescript upgrades; regex post-processing is fragile and order-dependent.

code_examples.scenario: Generate the full SDK (schemas + zod) after the OpenAPI spec changes
code_examples.code:
# From api/client/javascript/
pnpm --frozen-lockfile install
pnpm run generate        # runs generate:client + generate:zod
pnpm run build           # duel ESM+CJS build
pnpm run lint            # tsc --noEmit && biome lint
pnpm run test            # vitest --run
